recommendations.title: Civil War
recommendations.overview: In the near future, a group of war journalists attempt to survive while reporting the truth as the United States stands on the brink of civil war.

recommendations.title: Annihilation
recommendations.overview: A biologist signs up for a dangerous, secret expedition into a mysterious zone where the laws of nature don't apply.

recommendations.title: Warfare
recommendations.overview: A platoon of Navy SEALs embarks on a dangerous mission in Ramadi, Iraq, with the chaos and brotherhood of war retold through their memories of the event.

recommendations.title: Men

recommendations.title: Children of the Damned
recommendations.overview: Six children are found spread through out the world that not only have enormous intelligence, but identical intelligence and have a strange bond to each other.

recommendations.title: Singularity
recommendations.overview: When Elias van Dorne, CEO of the world's largest robotics company, introduces his most powerful invention, Kronos-a super-computer designed to end all wars-it determines that humans are the biggest threat and launches a worldwide attack on mankind. A

recommendations.title: La Jetée
recommendations.overview: A man confronts his past during an experiment that attempts to find a solution to the problems of a post-apocalyptic world caused by a world war.

recommendations.title: M3GAN

recommendations.title: Ron's Gone Wrong
recommendations.overview: In a world where walking, talking, digitally connected bots have become children's best friends, an 11-year-old finds that his robot buddy doesn't quite work the same as the others do.

recommendations.title: RoboCop
